faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.a1: MOQ varies by product — typically 200m for webbing, 500m for elastic and jacquard, and 1000m for standard elastic bands. Custom products are negotiated per project.
faq.a2: Standard products ship in 2–4 weeks. Custom jacquard and specialty items require 4–8 weeks. Rush orders are available — contact us to discuss.
faq.a3: Yes. Sample requests for standard products are fulfilled within 5 business days at no charge. Custom samples are priced based on complexity.
faq.q4: What certifications do your products carry?
faq.a4: Products carry OEKO-TEX Standard 100, ISO 9001:2015, and GRS certifications. Client-specific compliance packages are available on request.
